query:
SELECT 
  sessionId,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(allocatedCapital) as totalAllocated,
  SUM(COALESCE(unrealizedPnl, 0)) as totalUnrealizedPnl
FROM paperPositions 
WHERE status = 'open'
GROUP BY sessionId
ORDER BY sessionId;

SELECT 
  sessionId,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(allocatedCapital) as totalAllocated,
  SUM(COALESCE(unrealizedPnl, 0)) as totalUnrealizedPnl

GROUP BY sessionId
ORDER BY sessionId;
